# `catalog_extraction.json` Schema

<!-- Generated by scripts/generate_schema_docs.py; do not edit by hand. -->

`catalog_extraction.json` is generated by `scripts/extract_catalog_tables.py` from `catalog_review.json`. Agent code should not hand-fill this file.

Use `schema_version: "stella.article_data_assets.extraction.v2"`.

## Required Top-Level Fields

- `schema_version`
- `generated_at`
- `paper`
- `review`
- `run`
- `files`
- `tables`

## Top-Level Shape

```json
{
  "schema_version": "stella.article_data_assets.extraction.v2",
  "generated_at": "",
  "paper": {},
  "review": {},
  "run": {},
  "files": [],
  "tables": []
}
```

## Enum Values

- `deferred`
- `failed`
- `partial`
- `skipped`
- `skipped_existing`
- `stella.article_data_assets.extraction.v2`
- `success`
- `would_write`
- `written`

## Workflow Notes

- The extractor validates the manifest against this schema before writing it.
- Use `scripts/validate_catalog_extraction.py --require-reviewed` for final workflow checks.
- External resources from review are not represented in extraction output.
- Converter stdout/stderr contents stay in artifact files; JSON stores only artifact paths.

## JSON Schema

```json
{
  "$defs": {
    "ConversionAttempt": {
      "additionalProperties": false,
      "properties": {
        "method": {
          "title": "Method",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "status": {
          "enum": [
            "success",
            "failed",
            "skipped"
          ],
          "title": "Status",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "command": {
          "items": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "title": "Command",
          "type": "array"
        },
        "error": {
          "title": "Error",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "artifacts": {
          "additionalProperties": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "title": "Artifacts",
          "type": "object"
        }
      },
      "required": [
        "method",
        "status",
        "command",
        "error",
        "artifacts"
      ],
      "title": "ConversionAttempt",
      "type": "object"
    },
    "ExtractionColumn": {
      "additionalProperties": false,
      "properties": {
        "name": {
          "title": "Name",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "original_header": {
          "title": "Original Header",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "unit_text": {
          "title": "Unit Text",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "data_type": {
          "title": "Data Type",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "null_values": {
          "items": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "title": "Null Values",
          "type": "array"
        }
      },
      "required": [
        "name",
        "original_header",
        "unit_text",
        "data_type",
        "null_values"
      ],
      "title": "ExtractionColumn",
      "type": "object"
    },
    "ExtractionFileRecord": {
      "additionalProperties": false,
      "properties": {
        "id": {
          "title": "Id",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "internal_table_id": {
          "title": "Internal Table Id",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "kind": {
          "title": "Kind",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "status": {
          "enum": [
            "written",
            "skipped_existing",
            "would_write",
            "failed",
            "deferred"
          ],
          "title": "Status",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "source_ref": {
          "$ref": "#/$defs/ExtractionFileSourceRef"
        },
        "source_path": {
          "title": "Source Path",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "excerpt_path": {
          "title": "Excerpt Path",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "sha256": {
          "title": "Sha256",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "line_count": {
          "title": "Line Count",
          "type": "integer"
        },
        "error": {
          "title": "Error",
          "type": "string"
        }
      },
      "required": [
        "id",
        "internal_table_id",
        "kind",
        "status",
        "source_ref",
        "source_path",
        "excerpt_path",
        "sha256",
        "line_count",
        "error"
      ],
      "title": "ExtractionFileRecord",
      "type": "object"
    },
    "ExtractionFileSourceRef": {
      "additionalProperties": false,
      "properties": {
        "path": {
          "default": "",
          "title": "Path",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "start_line": {
          "default": 0,
          "title": "Start Line",
          "type": "integer"
        },
        "end_line": {
          "default": 0,
          "title": "End Line",
          "type": "integer"
        },
        "caption": {
          "default": "",
          "title": "Caption",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "label": {
          "default": "",
          "title": "Label",
          "type": "string"
        }
      },
      "title": "ExtractionFileSourceRef",
      "type": "object"
    },
    "ExtractionOptions": {
      "additionalProperties": false,
      "properties": {
        "arxiv_id": {
          "title": "Arxiv Id",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "internal_table_id": {
          "anyOf": [
            {
              "type": "string"
            },
            {
              "type": "null"
            }
          ],
          "title": "Internal Table Id"
        },
        "dry_run": {
          "title": "Dry Run",
          "type": "boolean"
        },
        "overwrite": {
          "title": "Overwrite",
          "type": "boolean"
        }
      },
      "required": [

        "overwrite"
      ],
      "title": "ExtractionOptions",
      "type": "object"
    },
    "ExtractionPaper": {
      "additionalProperties": false,
      "properties": {
        "arxiv_id": {
          "title": "Arxiv Id",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "title": {
          "title": "Title",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "month": {
          "title": "Month",
          "type": "string"
        }
      },
      "required": [
        "arxiv_id",
        "title",
        "month"
      ],
      "title": "ExtractionPaper",
      "type": "object"
    },
    "ExtractionReviewRef": {
      "additionalProperties": false,
      "properties": {
        "path": {
          "title": "Path",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "schema_version": {
          "title": "Schema Version",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "review_status": {
          "title": "Review Status",
          "type": "string"
        }
      },
      "required": [
        "path",

        "review_status"
      ],
      "title": "ExtractionReviewRef",
      "type": "object"
    },
    "ExtractionRun": {
      "additionalProperties": false,
      "properties": {
        "run_id": {
          "title": "Run Id",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "started_at": {
          "title": "Started At",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "tool": {
          "title": "Tool",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "options": {
          "$ref": "#/$defs/ExtractionOptions"
        },
        "summary": {
          "$ref": "#/$defs/ExtractionSummary"
        },
        "status": {
          "enum": [
            "success",
            "partial",
            "failed",
            "skipped"
          ],
          "title": "Status",
          "type": "string"
        }
      },
      "required": [
        "run_id",

        "tool",
        "options",
        "summary",
        "status"
      ],
      "title": "ExtractionRun",
      "type": "object"
    },
    "ExtractionSummary": {
      "additionalProperties": false,
      "properties": {
        "internal_table_count": {
          "title": "Internal Table Count",
          "type": "integer"
        },
        "work_count": {
          "title": "Work Count",
          "type": "integer"
        },
        "table_count": {
          "title": "Table Count",
          "type": "integer"
        },
        "success_count": {
          "title": "Success Count",
          "type": "integer"
        },
        "failed_count": {
          "title": "Failed Count",
          "type": "integer"
        },
        "deferred_count": {
          "title": "Deferred Count",
          "type": "integer"
        },
        "file_count": {
          "title": "File Count",
          "type": "integer"
        },
        "file_success_count": {
          "title": "File Success Count",
          "type": "integer"
        },
        "file_failed_count": {
          "title": "File Failed Count",
          "type": "integer"
        }
      },
      "required": [

        "success_count",

      "title": "ExtractionSummary",
      "type": "object"
    },
    "ExtractionTableRecord": {
      "additionalProperties": false,
      "properties": {
        "id": {
          "title": "Id",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "internal_table_id": {
          "title": "Internal Table Id",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "status": {
          "enum": [
            "success",
            "would_write",
            "skipped_existing",
            "failed",
            "deferred"
          ],
          "title": "Status",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "ecsv_path": {
          "title": "Ecsv Path",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "caption": {
          "title": "Caption",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "label": {
          "title": "Label",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "row_count": {
          "title": "Row Count",
          "type": "integer"
        },
        "column_count": {
          "title": "Column Count",
          "type": "integer"
        },
        "environment": {
          "title": "Environment",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "header_rows": {
          "items": {
            "items": {
              "type": "string"
            },
            "type": "array"
          },
          "title": "Header Rows",
          "type": "array"
        },
        "columns": {
          "items": {
            "$ref": "#/$defs/ExtractionColumn"
          },
          "title": "Columns",
          "type": "array"
        },
        "warnings": {
          "items": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "title": "Warnings",
          "type": "array"
        },

          "title": "Error",

          "title": "Conversion Attempts",

        },

          "type": "string"

      "required": [

        "environment",
        "header_rows",
        "columns",
        "warnings",

      ],
      "title": "ExtractionTableRecord",

  "additionalProperties": false,
  "properties": {
    "schema_version": {
      "const": "stella.article_data_assets.extraction.v2",
      "title": "Schema Version",

    },
    "generated_at": {
      "title": "Generated At",
      "type": "string"
    },
    "paper": {
      "$ref": "#/$defs/ExtractionPaper"
    },
    "review": {
      "$ref": "#/$defs/ExtractionReviewRef"
    },
    "run": {
      "$ref": "#/$defs/ExtractionRun"
    },
    "files": {
      "items": {
        "$ref": "#/$defs/ExtractionFileRecord"
      },
      "title": "Files",
      "type": "array"
    },
    "tables": {
      "items": {
        "$ref": "#/$defs/ExtractionTableRecord"
      },
      "title": "Tables",
      "type": "array"
    }
  },
  "required": [
    "schema_version",
    "generated_at",
    "paper",
    "review",
    "run",
    "files",
    "tables"
  ],
  "title": "CatalogExtractionRecord",
  "type": "object"
}
```
